name: scaffold-touchstone-app
description: Scaffold a Touchstone-shaped React application end-to-end. Use Claude Code to lay down a Vite + React + @4lt7ab/touchstone project that renders five real pages — Dashboard, list views, detail views, team grids — across twelve themes, with the AppShell envelope, animated backgrounds, and accessible compound components already wired up. The kit is the workshop; this plugin walks the apprentice in.
